narrative:
Precinct Avon Lake City 4-D (precinct in Lorain County) has 1,467 registered voters, with 54.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 23.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 21.9%, a narrow Republican lean of 1.5 percentage points.
